```{=typst}
#pagebreak()
// Back-cover-style closing — no page number.
#wcg-nums.update(false)
#set page(numbering: none)
#wcg-fullbleed(c-deep)
#place(top + left, dx: -(mg-x - 0.55in), dy: -(mg-y - 0.5in),
  rect(width: 7.4in, height: 10in, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold, radius: 3pt))
#v(1.15in)
#align(center)[
  #wcg-logo(size: 0.95in, ink: c-ivory, dot: c-gold)
  #v(0.34in)
  #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 30pt, weight: 700, fill: c-ivory)[One last thing]
  #v(0.28in)
  #block(width: 4.9in)[
    #set par(leading: 0.95em, justify: false)
    #text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12.5pt, fill: c-sand)[
      You gave a week of gentle attention to something most people rush past. That
      is not a small thing. This was never really about a coffee or a cart — it was
      about confidence: the quiet sense that you can understand your own choices and
      adjust them when you want to.
    ]
  ]
  #v(0.3in)
  #grid(columns: (auto, auto, auto, auto, auto), column-gutter: 0.22in, align: horizon,
    text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12pt, weight: 600, tracking: 2pt, fill: c-gold)[NOTICE],
    text(size: 10pt, fill: c-sage)[•],
    text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12pt, weight: 600, tracking: 2pt, fill: c-gold)[PAUSE],
    text(size: 10pt, fill: c-sage)[•],
    text(font: ("Manrope",), size: 12pt, weight: 600, tracking: 2pt, fill: c-gold)[REPEAT],
  )
  #v(0.22in)
  #block(width: 4.6in, text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), style: "italic", size: 15pt, fill: c-ivory)[
    Notice one thing at a time. Pause when you can. Repeat what helps — and begin
    again whenever you drift.
  ])
]
#v(1fr)
#align(center)[
  #line(length: 20%, stroke: 0.75pt + c-gold)
  #v(0.24in)
  #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), size: 24pt, weight: 700, fill: c-ivory)[Micro Saving Daily]
  #v(0.06in)
  #text(font: ("Cormorant Garamond",), style: "italic", size: 14pt, fill: c-sand)[Small habits. Stronger money confidence.]
  #v(0.14in)
  #wcg-domain(dark: true, size: 11pt)
]
#v(0.5in)
```
